cited_quotes: On January 2, 2026, Buyer A entered into a confidentiality agreement with Target Co. and was granted access to a virtual data room.
On February 14, 2026, Buyer A delivered a non-binding indication of interest valued at $25.50 per share, subject to confirmatory due diligence.
The board of directors of Target Co. began considering strategic alternatives in late 2025 after receiving an unsolicited inbound expression of interest from a financial sponsor.
On March 7, 2026, Buyer A entered into a confidentiality agreement with Target Co. and was granted access to a virtual data room.
notes: Date altered from January 2 to March 7.
